buildCommand: ng build --configuration production && cp dist/E-commerce/browser/index.csr.html dist/E-commerce/browser/index.html

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://ecommerce.routemisr.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
